name: React Native skills (hub)
description: Engineering (Jan 2026). Token-safe hub for React Native + Expo: rendering safety, list virtualization, Reanimated/gestures, scroll perf, native navigation, state patterns, compiler + shared values, UI primitives, monorepo native deps.

metadata.intent: Apply React Native performance and correctness patterns without loading a giant doc

must_use: Open only the leaf module(s) matching the symptom (crash vs jank vs nav vs monorepo).
must_not: Bulk-load unrelated RN ecosystem docs into one agent context
conventions: Prefer native primitives (Modal, native nav, native menus) over heavy JS-only sheets when possible.

steps.description: Crashes / `Text strings must be rendered within a Text` / falsy `&&` → `react-native-core-rendering`.
Scroll jank, FlatList/FlashList/LegendList, images in lists, heterogeneous rows → `react-native-list-performance`.
Reanimated jank, press feedback, scroll position updates → `react-native-animation-gestures-scroll`.
Stack/tabs feel non-native or slow transitions → `react-native-navigation`.
Redundant state, stale updates, shared-value as visual instead of truth → `react-native-state-patterns`.
Images, menus, modals, safe area, styling, compound button APIs → `react-native-ui-patterns`.
Autolinking / native modules in monorepo / design-system re-exports → `react-native-monorepo-imports`.
Intl formatters in hot paths, font loading strategy → `react-native-js-fonts-intl`.
